## Checklist

- [ ] Branch named `feat/...`, `fix/...`, `chore/...`, or `docs/...`
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (e.g. `feat(scope): ... (VT-NN)`)
- [ ] `lint`, `typecheck`, `test` checks pass
- [ ] No cross-product env vars (no `REPORTS_*`)
- [ ] No business logic added that belongs in a later ticket
- [ ] Reviewer assigned (Fazal signs off on structure changes)
